name: sonicjs-app
description: SonicJS Deploy Now - Deploy to Cloudflare Workers in one click

scripts.deploy: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:production: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:774: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && wrangler deploy --env server774
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env production
scripts.db:migrate:774: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env server774
